# The Beach Club

### **Hallandale-Hollywood / 2005**

44 Stories / 385 Residences of
1, 2 & 3 Bedrooms

**1850 S Ocean Dr, Hallandale Beach, FL 33009, USA**

Beach Club Hallandale is placed perfectly on the beautiful pearlescent Hallandale beach with azure waters perfect for relaxing or sailing. Nestled between Miami Beach and Fort Lauderdale, Beach Club Hallandale is a short 15 mile drive from South Beach and only 10 miles from the heart of Fort Lauderdale. The development of Beach Club Hallandale include 3 highrise residential luxury towers allowing all residents to enjoy the picturesque views of the Intracoastal Waterways, Atlantic Ocean, as well as the Miami / Fort Lauderdale skylines.

This condominium building is part of a luxury residential complex with 2 other towers… [The Beach Club II](https://miamiresidential.com/thebeachclub2/) and [The Beach Club III](https://miamiresidential.com/thebeachclub3/)

11 Units for Sale:
$740,000 - $3,295,000

14 Units for Rent:
$3,650 - $9,800

## Features

### Building Features

- Over 500 feet of magnificent ocean frontage
- Oversized heated swimming pool and spa overlooking the Atlantic Ocean
- Snack bar with pool-side services
- Lushly landscaped grounds
- Magnificent 2-story lobby entrance
- Spectacular porte-cochere
- 24-hour valet parking
- Multi-level covered parking
- Full time concierge
- Mail and package receiving desk
- 24-hour security

### Residence Features

- Spacious living room with adjacent terrace
- Oversize terraces with glass railing accessible from bedrooms and living room
- Elegant ceilings rising to 8-feet 7 and 1/2 inches
- Floor to ceiling laminated windows with energy efficient tinted glass
- Top-of-the-line stackable washer and dryer
- High efficiency central air conditioning and heating unit
- Sprinkler fire protection system
- State-of-the-art telecommunications wiring including high-speed cabling to all television outlets and home-run configured CAT5 cable for telephone and data communication


![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/08-Beach-Club-I-View.jpg)

## About Miami Beach Club

_**Miami Beach Club**_ is a 2-story Condo-Hotel on prime oceanfront real estate at [_**19051 Collins Ave, Sunny Isles Beach, FL 33160.**_](https://www.sunnyislescondosre.com/sunny-isles-beach/miami-beach-club/ "Miami Beach Club")

## Facts About Miami Beach Club

- Direct ocean access
- Developed as a hotel in 1951
- Only 107 studio units
- Easy rentals

[**Sunny Isles Beach**](https://www.sunnyislescondosre.com/sunny-isles-beach/) Real Estate is a final world-class destination on the striking coastline of **South Florida**. Lying between the Intracoastal Waterways and the Atlantic Ocean, the island offers days of sun on its white-sand beaches.

## Amenities

- Heated Swimming Pool by the Ocean
- Assigned Parking Space
- Laundry Facilities on Each Floor
- Short-Term Rentals Allowed
- Studios
- Within Walking Distance to Houses of Worship
- Security

[**Sunny Isles Beach**](https://www.sibfl.net/) is between Miami and Ft Lauderdale Airports, only a few miles away from **The Bal Harbour Shops** in the [_**Bal Harbour Villages**_](https://www.sunnyislescondosre.com/bal-harbour/ "Bal Harbour") and The **[Turnberry Isles Gulf Course](https://turnberryislecountryclub.com/)** in [_**Aventura.**_](https://www.sunnyislescondosre.com/aventura/ "Aventura")

Are you considering buying or selling your studio at _**Miami Beach Club** **Condo** **?**_ Call **Gladis Henriquez at 305-281-8653 \|** Optimar International Realty for a free condo evaluation on _**[Sunny Isles Beach.](https://www.sunnyislescondosre.com/south-florida-market-reports/ "Sunny Isles Beach Market Reports")**_
